items.title: [负面] This review doesn't represent my actual opinion on...
items.summary:
This review doesn't represent my actual opinion on the game; it's just a salty reaction to the devs removing the auto-battle feature from certain game modes. 

As a casual player who just wants to collect pretty characters and not engage with the mechanics 90% of the time this pissed me off. Made me glad that I decided againist buying the battle pass just the day prior and really made me want to drop the game entirely after 4 months of figuring things out at my own pace and being content with my slow growth. 

As someone wise said having options is always better so I don't understand people who defend that decision of theirs to remove an existing feature and waste player's time.

items.summary: É um jogo interessante, a mistura de "slave of spire" com um gacha justo, me trouxeram uma felicidade enorme.
